title: Chazaliella rotundifolia
taxonomy: Chazaliella rotundifolia is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, which includes a large group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which comprises several other plant families. The order Lamiales is further classified within the clade Asterids, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The clade Asterids is part of the larger group called Angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants. The classification of Chazaliella rotundifolia highlights its evolutionary relationships with other plants within these groups.
